active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 4 must replace global archival passage search with scoped archive/passage eligibility in the real v3 composer and public benchmark diagnostics. Existing archival store/search code is present but insufficient because V3ContextComposer currently searches all archival passages globally.

objective: Make archival passage retrieval scoped and diagnosable in the real MemoryOS v3/public benchmark path, so unattached archives cannot pollute context and case-level reports can distinguish retrieval miss from archive scope exclusion.
why_now: Phase 3 completed structured core memory without claiming benchmark improvement. Existing archive/passage code is already in the tree, but global v3 archival search remains a demo-level gap and LoCoMo retrieval/context failures remain explicit.
implementation_constraints: Read work/phase-4/context_bundle.md before any phase-local artifact.
All regenerated markdown artifacts must start with '# phase: phase-4'.
All regenerated JSON artifacts must include "phase": "phase-4".
Do not add Letta as a runtime dependency.
Keep SQLite authoritative and Qdrant optional.
Keep MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v1 fallback explicit and isolated.
Do not claim benchmark improvement from 5/10-case smoke or aggregate pass rate alone.
Do not hide LoCoMo failures or pass-to-fail cases.
Do not use benchmark case-id hacks or expected-answer leaks.

expected_commands.focused_suite: uv run pytest tests/test_archival_store.py tests/test_archival_searcher.py tests/test_context_composer.py tests/test_engine.py tests/test_public_benchmarks.py -q
expected_commands.milestone_longmemeval: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30
expected_commands.milestone_locomo: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 30

usable_ack_checklist: Scoped archival eligibility is wired into real v3 build_context(), not only a helper or demo.
Unattached archive passages are excluded for scoped v3 requests.
Public benchmark diagnostics expose archival eligibility and selected passage/source IDs append-only.
Retrieval miss vs archive scope exclusion is diagnosable at case level.
LongMemEval and LoCoMo milestone or fallback case-level reports are separated.
Review lane confirms stale artifacts were regenerated after context_bundle.md.
No broad storage rewrite or Letta runtime dependency was introduced.
review_focus: Behavioral regression in v1 fallback, v3 default, public benchmark scoring, or kernel default.
Source grounding and source-hit candidate pollution from core/archival refs.
Prompt-hack, benchmark case-id, or expected-answer leakage.
Whether tests were actually RED before production changes.
Whether context bundle was used by plan, execute, and review outputs.
Whether mandatory milestone eval evidence is present or an explicit LLM-provider blocker is recorded.
decision_hint: Proceed to PLAN_STORM for phase-4. Existing phase-4 plan artifacts are stale and must be regenerated against this context bundle.
